fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you shipped the items on the invoice to.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posted invoice number.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that the invoice was sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer that the invoice was sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you communicate with the customer to whom the invoice was sent.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The contents will be printed on sales documents.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that the items were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the the name of the customer that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items on the invoice were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date on which the sales order was created.
The program copies the date from the Order Date field on the sales header.
You cannot change the order date because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the invoice was posted.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies any text that is entered to accompany the posting, for example for information to auditors.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that calculates the payment due date, payment discount date, and payment discount amount.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the sales invoices must be paid.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment discount percent granted if payment is made on or before the date in the Pmt. Discount Date field.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the amount in the entry must be paid for a payment discount to be granted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location from which the items were shipped.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's market type to link business transactions to.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relevant currency code for the sales invoices.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer price group used on the invoice.
The program copies the code from the Customer Price Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the customer price group because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the unit prices on the invoice lines include VAT.
The program copies the information from the Prices Including VAT field on the sales header.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code used to calculate the invoice discount.
The program copies the invoice discount code from the Invoice Disc. Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the invoice discount code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code used to calculate the customer's sales line discount.
The program copies the code from the Customer Disc. Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the customer discount group because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the language used on the sales invoice.
The program copies the code from the Language Code field on the sales header.
The language code made it possible for the items on the invoice lines to be written in the customer's language.
You cannot change the language code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which salesperson is associated with the invoice.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales order that this invoice was posted from.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether a comment has been entered for this sales invoice header.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: On Hold
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the invoice was marked as on hold when it was posted.
The program copies the information from the On Hold field on the sales header.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the invoice has been applied to an already-posted document. If so, the field shows the type of document applied to.
The program copies the information from the Applies-to Doc. Type field on the sales header.
You cannot change the applies-to document type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the invoice has been applied to an already-posted document. If so, the field contains the number of the document applied to.
The program copies the number from the Applies-to Doc. No. field on the sales header.
You cannot change the applies-to document number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the general ledger account to which a balancing entry for the invoice was posted.
The program copies the number from the Bal. Account No. field on the sales header.
You cannot change the balancing account number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total, in the currency of the invoice, of the amounts on all the invoice lines. The amount does not include VAT.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the amounts, including VAT, on all the lines on the document.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's VAT registration number for customers.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is associated with the invoice.
The program copies the reason code from the Reason Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the reason code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general business posting group code that is assigned to the customer that you sent the invoice to.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the invoice was part of an EU 3-party trade transaction.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the sales header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the sales header.
You cannot change the transaction type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the transport method of the sales header that this line was posted from.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the customer's VAT country/region code.
The program copies the VAT country/region code from the VAT Country/Region Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the VAT country/region code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of customer at the sell-to address.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer who will receive the products and be billed by default.

fields.name: Sell-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer that the items on the invoice were shipped to.

fields.name: Sell-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Sell-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer the invoice was sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Sell-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Sell-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Sell-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's main address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the balancing account type that is used on the invoice.
The program copies the balancing account type from the Bal. Account Type field on the sales header.
You cannot change the balancing account type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip: Specifies the point of exit through which you ship the items out of your country/region, for reporting to Intrastat.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether this sales invoice has been posted as a corrective entry.
The program copies the code from the Correction field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip: Specifies the area code used in the invoice.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip: Specifies the transaction specification that was used in the invoice.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the customer must pay for products on the sales document, such as with bank transfer, cash, or check.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Package Tracking No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping agent's package number.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the sales document from which the invoice was created.
If the posted invoice was created from an invoice, the program automatically copied this field from the No. Series field on the sales header. Otherwise, the field is blank.
You cannot change the pre-assigned number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted invoice.
The program automatically copies this field from the Posting No. Series field on the sales header.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Order No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the order from which the invoice was created.
The program automatically copies this field from the No. Series field on the order header.
If the invoice was not created from an order, the field is blank.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales document that the posted invoice was created for.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the user who posted the sales document.
You cannot change the user ID because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the sales invoice header.
The program copies the source code from either the Sales field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the source code because the invoice has been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax area that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the customer or vendor is liable for sales tax.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the customer.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the sales header.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to use to discount the VAT element if a payment discount is to be posted. The value is validated against the maximum possible VAT Tolerance % field value in the General Ledger Setup. The maximum value cannot be overridden with the exception of a credit note where you can manually enter the value used for the payment discount.

fields.name: Prepayment No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted prepayment invoice if the invoice is a prepayment invoice.
The program automatically copies this field from the Prepayment No. Series field on the sales header.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Prepayment Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the invoice is a prepayment invoice.

fields.name: Prepayment Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the sales order that this prepayment invoice was posted fromif the invoice is a prepayment invoice.
You cannot change the order number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Quote No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales quote document if a quote was used to start the sales process.

fields.name: Company Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account to use for bank information when the document is printed.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date on the invoice.

fields.name: Payment Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment of the sales invoice.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Document Exchange Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the document if you are using a document exchange service to send it as an electronic document. The status values are reported by the document exchange service.

fields.name: Coupled to Dataverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the posted sales order is coupled to a sales order in Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: Direct Debit Mandate ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direct-debit mandate that the customer has signed to allow direct debit collection of payments.

fields.name: Closed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice is paid. The check box will also be selected if a credit memo for the remaining amount has been applied.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid for the posted sales invoice.

fields.name: Cust. Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Used to determine if the posted sales invoice is paid. The state is shown in the Paid field on the posted sales invoice.

fields.name: Invoice Discount Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the amount that is calculated and shown in the Invoice Discount Amount field at the bottom of sales invoices. The amount is deducted from the value shown in the Total Incl. VAT field.
If you have set up invoice discounts for the customer, then the specified percentage value is automatically inserted in the Customer Invoice Discount % field if the criteria are met. The calculated discount amount is inserted in the Invoice Discount Amount field, but you can change it manually. For more information, see How to: Set Up Invoice Discount Terms.

fields.name: Cancelled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice has been either corrected or canceled.

fields.name: Corrective
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice is a corrective document.

fields.name: Promised Pay Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the customer have promised to pay this invoice.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign that the document is linked to.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a unique identifier for the contact person at the customer the invoice was sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact the invoice was sent to.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the responsibility center associated with the user who created the invoice, your company, or the customer in the sales invoice.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent service is used to transport the items on the sales document to the customer.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a line discount has been calculated for the price offered.

fields.name: Get Shipment Used
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.
